auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Chatarmin API key sent as a Bearer token. Find it in your Chatarmin dashboard profile settings: https://chatarmin.com/dashboard/profile

actions.name: add_or_replace_voucher_codes
actions.description: Add new voucher codes to a Chatarmin pool or replace one unused code.

codes.description: Voucher code strings to add to the pool.

id.description: The ID of the existing voucher code to replace.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding voucher codes or replacing an unused voucher code.

raw.description: The raw Chatarmin voucher code update response.

outputSchema.description: The Chatarmin voucher code update result.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create a new Chatarmin contact.

phone.description: The contact phone number in international format.

consent.description: The Chatarmin consent state for the contact.

externalId.description: An external identifier to store on the contact.

additionalProperties.description: A custom property value accepted by Chatarmin.

properties.description: Custom contact properties keyed by Chatarmin property name.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Chatarmin contact.

actions.name: create_voucher_pool
actions.description: Create a Chatarmin voucher pool with an initial list of voucher codes.

poolName.description: The display name of the voucher pool.

vouchers.description: Voucher code strings to add to the pool.

reuseCodes.description: Whether contacts who already received a code should get the same code again.

reminderThreshold.description: The remaining voucher count that triggers reminder emails.

reminderEmailAdresses.description: Email addresses to notify when the reminder threshold is reached.

emptyMessage.description: Fallback text sent when the voucher pool is empty.

doNotSendWhenEmpty.description: Whether Chatarmin should skip sending when the pool is empty.

emptyOptions.description: Behavior settings for an empty voucher pool.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Chatarmin voucher pool.

actions.name: create_webhook
actions.description: Create a Chatarmin webhook for one supported topic.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Chatarmin webhook.

actions.name: delete_contact
actions.description: Delete a Chatarmin contact by contact ID or externalId.

contactId.description: The Chatarmin contact ID or externalId.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Chatarmin contact.

outputSchema.description: The result of a successful Chatarmin deletion request.

actions.name: delete_voucher_pool
actions.description: Delete a Chatarmin voucher pool and its unused voucher codes.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Chatarmin voucher pool.

outputSchema.description: The result of a successful Chatarmin deletion request.

actions.name: delete_webhook
actions.description: Delete a Chatarmin webhook by webhook ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Chatarmin webhook.

outputSchema.description: The result of a successful Chatarmin deletion request.

actions.name: get_campaign
actions.description: Retrieve one Chatarmin campaign by campaign ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one Chatarmin campaign.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Retrieve one Chatarmin contact by contact ID or externalId.

contactId.description: The Chatarmin contact ID or externalId.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one Chatarmin contact.

actions.name: get_flow
actions.description: Retrieve one Chatarmin flow by flow ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one Chatarmin flow.

actions.name: get_flow_analytics
actions.description: Retrieve paginated Chatarmin flow analytics for a flow.

limit.description: The number of items to return per page.

start.description: The analytics start timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

end.description: The analytics end timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving paginated Chatarmin flow analytics.

data.description: The flow analytics records returned by Chatarmin.

page.description: The current page number returned by Chatarmin.

limit.description: The page size returned by Chatarmin.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Chatarmin.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages returned by Chatarmin.

outputSchema.description: A page of Chatarmin flow analytics.

actions.name: get_flow_contact_analytics
actions.description: Retrieve Chatarmin flow analytics for specific contacts.

contactIds.description: Contact IDs to fetch analytics for.

start.description: The analytics start timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

end.description: The analytics end timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving Chatarmin flow analytics for specific contacts.

additionalProperties.description: Analytics for one Chatarmin contact in the flow.

data.description: Flow analytics keyed by Chatarmin contact ID.

outputSchema.description: Chatarmin flow analytics keyed by contact ID.

actions.name: get_voucher_pool
actions.description: Retrieve one Chatarmin voucher pool by voucher pool ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one Chatarmin voucher pool.

actions.name: list_campaigns
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Chatarmin campaigns with optional day or month metrics.

limit.description: The number of items to return per page.

startDate.description: The start date for grouped campaign metrics.

endDate.description: The end date for grouped campaign metrics.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Chatarmin campaigns.

page.description: The current page number returned by Chatarmin.

limit.description: The page size returned by Chatarmin.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Chatarmin.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages returned by Chatarmin.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Chatarmin contacts with optional text search.

limit.description: The number of items to return per page.

search.description: Optional search text matched by Chatarmin against firstname, lastname, email, and phone.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Chatarmin contacts.

page.description: The current page number returned by Chatarmin.

limit.description: The page size returned by Chatarmin.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Chatarmin.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages returned by Chatarmin.

actions.name: list_flows
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Chatarmin flows with optional day or month metrics.

limit.description: The number of items to return per page.

startDate.description: The start date for grouped flow metrics.

endDate.description: The end date for grouped flow metrics.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Chatarmin flows.

page.description: The current page number returned by Chatarmin.

limit.description: The page size returned by Chatarmin.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Chatarmin.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages returned by Chatarmin.

actions.name: list_voucher_pools
actions.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Chatarmin voucher pools with voucher codes.

limit.description: The number of items to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Chatarmin voucher pools.

data.description: The voucher pools returned by Chatarmin.

page.description: The current page number returned by Chatarmin.

limit.description: The page size returned by Chatarmin.

total.description: The total number of matching records returned by Chatarmin.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages returned by Chatarmin.

outputSchema.description: A page of Chatarmin voucher pools.

actions.name: list_webhooks
actions.description: Retrieve all Chatarmin webhooks for the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Chatarmin webhooks.

outputSchema.description: Chatarmin webhooks for the authenticated user.

actions.name: remove_voucher_code
actions.description: Remove one unused voucher code from a Chatarmin voucher pool.

code.description: The voucher code string to remove.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing one Chatarmin voucher code.

outputSchema.description: The result of a successful Chatarmin deletion request.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a WhatsApp text, media, document, or template message to a Chatarmin contact.

phone.description: The recipient phone number in international format.

email.description: The recipient email address used to look up the contact.

contactId.description: The Chatarmin contact ID or externalId of the recipient.

type.description: The WhatsApp message type to send.

text.description: The message body text. Required when type is text.

mediaUrl.description: The publicly accessible media URL. Required for image, video, and document messages.

caption.description: An optional media caption. Chatarmin supports captions up to 1024 characters.

fileName.description: An optional file name for document messages.

templateName.description: The exact approved WhatsApp template name.

language.description: The WhatsApp template language code approved for the template.

sub_type.description: The button subtype when the component type is button.

index.description: The zero-based template button index when type is button.

text.description: The text value for a text parameter.

link.description: The public URL of the template header media.
The public URL of the template header media.
The public URL of the template header media.

items.description: A single WhatsApp template parameter value.

parameters.description: The runtime values to substitute into the template component.

items.description: A WhatsApp template component with runtime parameters.

components.description: Template components used to fill dynamic template placeholders.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a WhatsApp message through Chatarmin. Provide exactly one of phone, email, or contactId.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update an existing Chatarmin contact by contact ID or externalId.

contactId.description: The Chatarmin contact ID or externalId.

phone.description: The contact phone number in international format.

consent.description: The Chatarmin consent state for the contact.

externalId.description: An external identifier to store on the contact.

additionalProperties.description: A custom property value accepted by Chatarmin.

properties.description: Custom contact properties keyed by Chatarmin property name.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Chatarmin contact.

actions.name: update_voucher_pool
actions.description: Update a Chatarmin voucher pool's name, settings, or unused voucher codes.

poolName.description: The display name of the voucher pool.

vouchers.description: Voucher code strings to add to the pool.

reuseCodes.description: Whether contacts who already received a code should get the same code again.

reminderThreshold.description: The remaining voucher count that triggers reminder emails.

reminderEmailAdresses.description: Email addresses to notify when the reminder threshold is reached.

emptyMessage.description: Fallback text sent when the voucher pool is empty.

doNotSendWhenEmpty.description: Whether Chatarmin should skip sending when the pool is empty.

emptyOptions.description: Behavior settings for an empty voucher pool.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating an existing Chatarmin voucher pool.

actions.name: update_webhook
actions.description: Update a Chatarmin webhook URL or topic.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating an existing Chatarmin webhook.
